curation_notes: Locations derived from patch diff. The patch adds path.Clean() normalization in three non-test source files: rule/rule.go (IsMatching), proxy/request_handler.go (InitializeAuthnSession), and proxy/proxy.go (ConfigureBackendURL). Two additional non-test files (rule/engine_glob.go and rule/repository_memory.go) had only cosmetic changes (renaming unused parameters to _). Marked as noisy because 5 non-test source files were changed in total.
